Why ASA Tiling

Why We're
Different

01

Obsessive Precision

Every joint is perfectly spaced, every line laser-straight. We don't rush — we do it right. Our attention to detail is visible in every completed project.

02

Fully Licensed & Insured

You're fully protected on every job. ASA Tiling is a licensed trade business — no shortcuts, no cowboys, just professional work backed by proper credentials.

03

Transparent Pricing

No surprise invoices. We quote upfront and stick to it. You'll know exactly what you're paying before a single tile is laid.

04

End-to-End Service

From design advice to final clean-up, we handle everything. Bathrooms, kitchens, staircases, feature walls — one team for the whole job.

What We Do

Our Services

Bathroom Renovations

Complete bathroom transformations — from waterproofing to the final grout. Showers, wet areas, feature walls and floors done to perfection.

Floor & Wall Tiling

Interior and exterior floor and wall tiling using porcelain, ceramic, marble, and natural stone. Large format tiles are our specialty.

Feature Walls & Fireplaces

Make a statement with a bold tiled feature wall or fireplace surround. We work with any material to match your vision.

Staircase Tiling

Marble, porcelain or stone — we tile staircases to a high-end standard with precise edge and nosing finishes that last a lifetime.

Outdoor & Alfresco

Pool surrounds, alfresco areas, driveways and pathways. Slip-rated, weather-proof, and built for the Australian climate.

Waterproofing

AS 3740 compliant waterproofing on all wet areas. Don't risk leaks — our waterproofing is thorough, certified, and built into every quote.
